notes.subject: Attached: Daily Report June 2026
notes.body: Link to June 2026 FG Daily Report.xlsx. Sales budget calculations are at the bottom of your location sheet. Budgets take into consideration May 2026 sales trends and added DoorDash + UberEats promotions for June. Let's have a terrific June!
